title: Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Sonata Software Ventures Solutions in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sonata Software Ventures Solutions:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software Ventures Solutions!
